flags.concern: Shot matching semantics: the lookup logic in Step 2 is wrong for the approved behavior. It uses overlap matching, so shots with only a subset of the selected generations would appear.
flags.evidence: The approved Q1 says existing shots must be a FULL match. The plan's Step 2 sample uses `shots.filter(shot => shot.images?.some(img => genIdSet.has(img.generation_id)))`, and its assumptions/success criteria also say 'ANY of the selected generation IDs'. `selectionShotCreationState` already computes the full selected generation ID list in `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:224-235`, so using `some(...)` would surface partial matches.

flags.concern: Gallery selection IDs: Step 5 targets the wrong identifier source in the gallery. `selectedGalleryIds` are item IDs, not generation IDs, so using them for shot lookup will miss matches whenever `image.id !== image.generation_id`.
flags.evidence: `selectedGalleryIds` is built from `gallerySelectionMap.keys()` in `src/shared/contexts/GallerySelectionContext.tsx:211-213`, while the actual generation ID is stored separately on each entry at `src/shared/contexts/GallerySelectionContext.tsx:71-86` and `src/shared/contexts/GallerySelectionContext.tsx:153-157`. `GenerationsPaneGallery` already resolves shot-creation IDs from `gallerySelectionMap.values().map(entry => entry.generationId)` in `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx:99-118`.

flags.concern: Gallery selection persistence: the plan fixes the timeline `clearSelection()` path but leaves the analogous gallery selection clear in place, so reopened `SelectionContextMenu` flows will not preserve multi-item selections.
flags.evidence: The plan removes `clearSelection()` only from `src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineEditor.tsx:237-270`. The gallery creation path still calls `clearGallerySelection()` immediately after creating the shot in `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx:103-118`. On the next right-click, `handleContextMenu` reselects only the clicked image when it is no longer selected (`src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx:120-129`), so a prior multi-selection cannot be reopened as-is.

flags.concern: Verification coverage: Step 8 skips an existing targeted gallery test suite even though Step 5 changes `GenerationsPaneGallery.tsx` directly.
flags.evidence: The plan's validation only mentions `npx vitest run src/tools/video-editor/` and `npx vitest run src/shared/components/SelectionContextMenu.test.tsx`. The repository already has `src/features/gallery/components/GenerationsPane/components/GenerationsPaneGallery.test.tsx`, and that file exercises the gallery context-menu path the plan modifies.
